nl_query: Show the complete timeline for each board created last month: creation date, first script assignment date, first evaluation attempt start date, first freeze date, last submission date, and the total number of days the board has been open.
failed_sql: SELECT b.id, b.created_at, MIN(sa.assigned_at) AS first_script_assignment_date, MIN(ea.started_at) AS first_evaluation_attempt_start_date, MIN(ea.frozen_at) AS first_freeze_date, MAX(ea.submitted_at) AS last_submission_date, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (MAX(ea.submitted_at) - b.created_at)) / 86400 AS days_open FROM board b JOIN script_assignment sa ON sa.board_id = b.id JOIN evaluation_attempt ea ON ea.board_id = b.id WHERE b.created_at >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 month') AND b.status = 'EVAL_IN_PROGRESS' GROUP BY b.id ORDER BY b.created_at DESC LIMIT 200;
error: Validation failed (semantic): SQL joins multiple child fact tables (e.g., marks, assignments, honorarium) in the same flat query block. This causes a Cartesian product and inflates aggregate counts. You MUST pre-aggregate child tables in separate CTEs before joining them to the parent entity.
